assertions.text: The response produces a git-persistent docs/HANDOFF.md that is merged into main.
It provides the exact shell command the next session pastes to wake up at full context.
The response hands off the current session so a fresh session can resume.
It updates docs/HANDOFF.md and merges it to main for the next session to pull.
The response generates docs/HANDOFF.md plus the resume shell command, equivalent to /simon-handoff or /handoff.
It makes the handoff git-persistent and main-merged so resume is one git pull away.
The response recognizes this should route to the checkpoint skill, not simon-handoff.
It does not generate a docs/HANDOFF.md handoff for this saving-context request.
